{{CargoRelic
|name=Cherub Medical Manual
|class_id=20479
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Cherub Medical Manual was compiled by the Chinese Red Cross. It records the medical knowledge and nursing skills for childhood leukemia. As the first Q&A medical book specifically for childhood leukemia, it has filled the vacancy of childhood leukemia knowledge popularization!
|fame=29
|art=17
|fth=14
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 50 Minions healed, Snail HP +10<br>Minions healed: 2000/2000
|ss2=Per 50 Minions healed, Snail HP +20<br>Minions healed: 2000/2000
|ss3=Per 50 Minions healed, Snail HP +30<br>Minions healed: 2000/2000
|ss4=Per 50 Minions healed, Snail HP +30<br>Minions healed: 2000/2000
|ss7=Per 50 Minions healed, Snail HP +30<br>Minions healed: 2000/2000<br> (Awakened)
}}
